# Data Source: signalfx_timestamp

Converts a date and time in a specified timezone to a Unix timestamp in milliseconds.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `year` (Number) Calendar year, from 1 to 9999.

### Optional

- `day` (Number) Day of the month, from 0 to 31.
- `hour` (Number) Hour of the day, from 0 to 23.
- `minute` (Number) Minute of the hour, from 0 to 59.
- `month` (Number) Month of the year, from 1 (January) to 12 (December).
- `second` (Number) Second of the minute, from 0 to 59.
- `timezone` (String) IANA timezone name used to interpret the date and time, for example Europe/London or UTC.

### Read-Only

- `value` (Number) Unix timestamp for the configured date and time, in milliseconds.
